activities.title: Plan Tomorrow Tonight
activities.description: Write a quick outline of tomorrow’s top 3 tasks before sleeping.

activities.title: Timer Focus Session
activities.description: Use a timer to work in focused bursts and track your progress.

activities.title: Morning Stretch Routine
activities.description: Do a short stretch series to activate your body and prepare for the day.

activities.title: Desk Setup Makeover
activities.description: Reorganize your workspace to make it motivating and distraction-free.

activities.title: Productivity Vision Collage
activities.description: Cut or draw images that represent your daily goals and arrange them visually.

activities.title: Mandala Coloring
activities.description: Color or trace mandala patterns to calm your mind.

activities.title: Guided Meditation
activities.description: Follow a short guided meditation to regulate your breathing and thoughts.

activities.title: Gratitude Breathing
activities.description: Take deep breaths while naming three things you are grateful for.

activities.title: Listen to Nature Sounds
activities.description: Play rain or forest sounds to reduce tension and restore calm.

activities.title: Warm Tea Break
activities.description: Prepare a warm tea and enjoy it slowly with mindful breathing.

activities.title: Pomodoro Practice
activities.description: Work for 25 minutes, then rest for 5 minutes to train focus.

activities.title: Flash Memory Challenge
activities.description: Practice recalling short facts or numbers for memory training.

activities.title: Focus on One Object
activities.description: Gaze at a single object for five minutes to strengthen attention control.

activities.title: Breathing + Counting Sync
activities.description: Count your breaths slowly to bring your mind back to the present moment.

activities.title: Balance Board Challenge
activities.description: Stand on one leg or balance board for short intervals to improve body awareness.

activities.title: Jump Rope Session
activities.description: Do fast-paced jump rope intervals to release built-up energy.

activities.title: Step Counter Goal
activities.description: Challenge yourself to reach 500 quick steps indoors or outside.

activities.title: Beat-Making or Rhythm Tapping
activities.description: Tap or create beats to express energy through sound and rhythm.

activities.title: Slow Movement Meditation
activities.description: Move your body slowly with awareness to balance high energy levels.

activities.title: Watch a Success Story Clip
activities.description: Watch a short video of someone achieving a goal to boost motivation.

activities.title: Draw Your Future Self
activities.description: Sketch yourself achieving one goal you want to reach this month.

activities.title: Stretch & Smile
activities.description: Do light stretching while smiling to release happy hormones.

activities.title: 5-Senses Reset
activities.description: Notice one thing you can see, touch, hear, smell, and taste to ground your mind.

activities.title: Write → Tear Exercise
activities.description: Write down your worries, then tear the paper as a symbolic release.

activities.title: Candlelight Focus
activities.description: Watch the gentle flicker of a candle to calm racing thoughts.

activities.title: Thought Sorting Worksheet
activities.description: List your thoughts under ‘Can Control’ and ‘Can’t Control’.

activities.title: Send a Voice Note to a Friend
activities.description: Record a quick message to check in with someone you care about.

activities.title: Join Online Support Group
activities.description: Chat or listen to others who share similar ADHD experiences.

activities.title: Make a Thank You Card
activities.description: Create or write a thank you note for someone supportive.

activities.title: 2-Minute Start Habit
activities.description: Commit to doing a task for just two minutes to overcome hesitation.

activities.title: Reward Jar
activities.description: Write small rewards on slips of paper for each task you finish.

activities.title: Schedule Audit
activities.description: Review your daily routine and identify the best times you feel most    focused.

activities.title: Self-Talk Reset
activities.description: Say one encouraging sentence to yourself out loud before starting a task.

activities.title: Quiet Space Reset
activities.description: Sit in a calm, dimly lit room and rest your senses for a few minutes.

activities.title: Breathing Box
activities.description: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s — repeat to stabilize your breath.

activities.title: Soft Color Painting
activities.description: Paint or draw using light, relaxing colors to soothe your mind.

activities.title: Create Daily Reminder Alarm
activities.description: Set recurring alarms for important tasks during your day.

activities.title: Design Visual Habit Chart
activities.description: Draw or decorate a chart for your morning and evening routines.

activities.title: End-of-Day Recap Note
activities.description: Before bed, jot down three things you accomplished today.

activities.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
activities.description: Inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 7, exhale for 8 to release anger.

activities.title: Mini Boxing
activities.description: Throw gentle air punches to release frustration safely.

activities.title: Scribble & Release
activities.description: Draw quick, random lines on paper to let out anger or tension.

activities.title: Write 3 Positive Traits
activities.description: List three strengths or achievements you’re proud of.

activities.title: Mirror Affirmations
activities.description: Look in the mirror and repeat one positive statement about yourself.

activities.title: Share a Positive Memory
activities.description: Tell someone about a happy or funny moment from your past.
